capture_note: Metadata aligned to 0.97.3 release prep without a full screenshot recapture. Images remain the 0.97.1 capture-mode DEMO DATA set (synthetic identifiers only). The deterministic Playwright harness uses unmistakably fictional DEMO-VULN identifiers and synthetic risk signals. These records demonstrate UI states only; they are not advisory, EPSS, KEV, or buyer-environment evidence.
